title: petrichor
description:
Petrichor is a first person horror game inspired by Outer Wilds. Other older games inspired us for the graphics.

You are in a cabin in the woods, some strange things are happening here. You will have to solve the mystery of this uncanny space in order to get out of here! Don't even try to run into the woods...

The clock is not ticking like you are used to. Be aware of it, this might save your life. 

The candle will help you find your way.

What you get:

• An uncanny experience

• Puzzles along your way

• A short gameplay

• Nice Graphics

• A very unexpected ending (no clickbait)
description_short: Petrichor is a first person horror game inspired by Outer Wilds. Other older games inspired us for the graphics. You are in a cabin in the woods, some strange things are happening here.
